name: Bill Weld
subject: the ballot box
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuw-Vs8MrFE8I859f1oBCz4E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=1) Team — What we already know about Donald Trump and his actions in office should be enough. Giving his children and son-in-law security clearances should have been enough. Revealing highly classified information to the Russians in the Oval Office should have been enough. Putting children in cages should have been enough. Asking foreign governments to investigate his domestic political opponents should have been enough. But it hasn’t been. [**That’s why we need your help to beat him at the ballot box in 2020.**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuw-Vs8MrFE8I859f1oBCz4E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=2) | | [SUPPORT BILL ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuw-Vs8MrFE8I859f1oBCz4E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=3)
---
Since day one, it was clear that President Donald Trump lacked the moral compass needed to lead our nation, **and every day he’s proven that to be true.**
I’m hopeful that Congress will soon end this national nightmare, but I’m not holding my breath.**If we’re going to remove Donald Trump from office once and for all, we’re going to have to do it the old fashioned way —**** _at the ballot box_****.**
[**And if we’re going to do that, we’re going to need your help. We’re being dramatically outspent by Trump’s campaign — on the ground, online, and on the airwaves. Can you make a contribution to our campaign today to help us stay competitive in this race?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuw-Vs8MrFE8I859f1oBCz4E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=4)
| [DONATE NOW ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuw-Vs8MrFE8I859f1oBCz4E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=5)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=6).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=7) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191113_fr&n=9), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: People First Disability Policy + Twitter Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98d3/1745724422/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability")
---
| | While everyone in Washington is focused on the impeachment inquiry into Trump's abuse of power, our campaign is focused on people in need of a champion. I'm running for president because I believe in an America where everyone counts, including people with disabilities. Today I released [the most ambitious and bold plan](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98d2/1745724422/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.huffpost.com/entry/julian-castro-people-first-disability-rights_n_5dcae025e4b0f9f04955e774?pkq&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+the+most+ambitious+and+bold+plan&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability") to expand inclusion and opportunity to all Americans: [the People First Disability Plan.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98d1/1745724422/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://issues.juliancastro.com/equality-for-people-with-disabilities/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+the+People+First+Disability+Plan&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability") Almost thirty years ago, the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) transformed the landscape of our nation. Achieving the four key promises of the ADA -- equal opportunity, full participation, independent living, and economic self-sufficiency -- is a never-ending struggle for equality and requires an ongoing fight for justice. [That's why I have a plan to fight for justice and prosperity for people with disabilities.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98d0/1745724422/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://issues.juliancastro.com/equality-for-people-with-disabilities/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+have+a+plan+to+fight+fo&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability") I will be participating in a **Twitter Town Hall TOMORROW at 9AM CST** with Sandy Ho, Founder and Co-Organizer of the Disability and Intersectionality Summit, discussing my People First Disability Plan. Make sure to send your questions on Twitter using #AskJulian! |
---

Tune in!
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98df/1745724422/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98de/1745724422/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98dd/1745724422/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98dc/1745724422/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98db/1745724422/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc826/3eb3e2fc/56a7a8f5/744d98da/1745724422/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=20191113_em_disability&source=20191113_em_disability"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
When they say everything is bigger in Texas, that includes this Senate race. With 20 media markets, 254 counties, and 28 million people, there's no state quite like Texas to campaign in.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb5/1294464893/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

When they say everything is bigger in Texas, that includes this Senate race. With 20 media markets, 254 counties, and 28 million people, there's no state quite like Texas to campaign in.

Top that off with Senator Cornyn's nearly $11 million war chest, and we're in for a long, tough competition. But _Roll Call_ just ranked Sen. Cornyn as one of the top ten most vulnerable senators. **[We can win this, but we've got to invest _now_ to build the campaign we'll need to do it!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**Pitch in now to help build the campaign we need to win!** **[Pitch in $10 toward digital ads to spread MJ's message far and wide >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")
[Pitch in $10 toward fueling MJ's travel around the _huge_ state of Texas >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")
[Pitch in $10 toward hiring top-notch staff to build a strong campaign >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Look, MJ doesn't have corporate PACs raising millions to back her up. She's a working mom and combat veteran who got in this race because **she wants to serve the people, not the special interests** \-- that's why she's not taking money from corporate PACs.

Instead, she's counting on _you_. **[Will you pitch in to help us win this race?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,
Team MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489080d/7f51f7bc/4bdf824d/4ef0bbb4/1294464893/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191113.2nd__497__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: Ed Markey (personal)
subject: I have to ask you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | A quick update for you, team: With Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, we're facing TWO primary opponents. The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory. So I have to ask you: _**[will you pitch in $27 or more before midnight and help us reach this week's fundraising goal?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-111319_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Team Monika
subject: POLITICO: Republican Rep. George Holding is the most at risk of losing his seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Now's the time to get Monika ahead

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d963/7dfbb003/42ac73ac/5527a903/1395578679/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191113_em_politico&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191113_em_politico&source=rtw_20191113_em_politico")
---
Friend,

Politico's _Morning Score_ reported this week that as North Carolina's state legislature redraws congressional lines, at least one Republican representative will be pushed out.

**And they 're guessing it will be Republican Representative George Holding--Monika's opponent.**

That means that 2020 is the time to unseat Representative Holding once and for all, and Monika is the candidate to do it.

**But we are in a tough three-way primary, and it's not guaranteed that Monika's campaign will be the one to win the primary.**

__Now_ is the time to donate to Monika's campaign._ Our resources right now are critical to funding the growth of our strong grassroots community, and without your help, we will fall behind. [**So please, rush a donation now and help us build up the foundation we need to ensure Monika is our next Congressional representative:**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d963/7dfbb003/42ac73ac/5527a900/1395578679/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191113_em_politico&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+So+please+rush+a+donation+now+and+help+u&utm_campaign=rtw_20191113_em_politico&source=rtw_20191113_em_politico") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d963/7dfbb003/42ac73ac/5527a901/1395578679/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191113_em_politico&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+5+raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191113_em_politico&source=rtw_20191113_em_politico")

clean_body: Now's the time to get Monika ahead | "" Friend, Politico's Morning Score reported this week that as North Carolina's state legislature redraws congressional lines, at least one Republican representative will be pushed out. And they 're guessing it will be Republican Representative George Holding--Monika's opponent. That means that 2020 is the time to unseat Representative Holding once and for all, and Monika is the candidate to do it. But we are in a tough three-way primary, and it's not guaranteed that Monika's campaign will be the one to win the primary. Now is the time to donate to Monika's campaign. Our resources right now are critical to funding the growth of our strong grassroots community, and without your help, we will fall behind. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Thanks for everything, Team Monika | | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. body:
Cory Gardner has a mountain of cash right now - can you chip in to make sure we're keeping up? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771474/691c9bd/6f8a27da/11a7f658/3237246958/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")

| Friend,

There's no way to minimize this: Cory Gardner has a mountain of cash right now. And with corporate PACs and special interests lining up behind him, catching up to him is going to be about as difficult as scaling a fourteener in 4 feet of snow.

But as with any good hike, with perseverance and grit, I know we're going to make it.

[**_Can you chip in right now to help us close the fundraising gap between us and Cory Gardner?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191113_SS_20191113-fr-SS-mountain-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Gardner started this campaign with a significant head start on the fundraising front. But with each new development, this team has stepped up to make sure we reach our goals.

And every time we reach our goals, we come that much closer to new leadership in Washington.

**Team, that 's a view that would make this hike worth it. We need your help right now to maintain our progress--can you chip in before midnight tonight?** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191113_SS_20191113-fr-SS-mountain-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

body:

Elizabeth has spent her whole life fighting for working families -- and she's ready to fight her heart out for the big, structural change we need to reshape our economy, our government, and our democracy.

But the only way we can win -- the only way we can make Washington work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top -- is to build a massive grassroots movement of people from Pennsylvania and across the country.

**How do we do that? We rely on people like you chipping in whatever they can to this email because grassroots donors fund this campaign.**

**[It's critical that we hit every monthly fundraising goal, and your $3 today would go a long way in expanding this movement. Can you please make your first donation today?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528856/45c30650/1059b1cb8/66f41e8a/1446886612/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU0Rl9FR1JfQlNDX0NfMjAxOTExMTNfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML54F_EGR_BSC_C_20191113_V1S1_P_T1")**

>
If we're going to meet the big challenges of our time, then it's going to take big, structural change. And here's the critical part: It's going to take all of us pitching in and fighting for it.

If you're not okay with a system that leaves families bankrupt for daring to receive medical care...

If you're not okay with a government that takes no action on climate change and puts our planet in more danger every single day...

If you're not okay with the ultra-wealthy and well-connected controlling our democracy...

If you're ready to dream big and fight hard for a level playing field for working people across the country...

**Then please donate today to support this campaign. Elizabeth has the plans that will fundamentally transform the lives of working families, but we need your help to win in 2020 and enact them.**

**[Chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to grow this movement fighting for the big, structural change that our country needs.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528856/45c30650/1059b1cb8/66f41e8a/1446886612/VEsEBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU0Rl9FR1JfQlNDX0NfMjAxOTExMTNfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML54F_EGR_BSC_C_20191113_V1S1_P_T1")**

clean_body: Elizabeth has spent her whole life fighting for working families -- and she's ready to fight her heart out for the big, structural change we need to reshape our economy, our government, and our... | | | "" Elizabeth has spent her whole life fighting for working families -- and she's ready to fight her heart out for the big, structural change we need to reshape our economy, our government, and our democracy. But the only way we can win -- the only way we can make Washington work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top -- is to build a massive grassroots movement of people from Pennsylvania and across the country. How do we do that? We rely on people like you chipping in whatever they can to this email because grassroots donors fund this campaign. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" If we're going to meet the big challenges of our time, then it's going to take big, structural change. And here's the critical part: It's going to take all of us pitching in and fighting for it. If you're not okay with a system that leaves families bankrupt for daring to receive medical care... If you're not okay with a government that takes no action on climate change and puts our planet in more danger every single day... If you're not okay with the ultra-wealthy and well-connected controlling our democracy... If you're ready to dream big and fight hard for a level playing field for working people across the country... Then please donate today to support this campaign. Elizabeth has the plans that will fundamentally transform the lives of working families, but we need your help to win in 2020 and enact them. "" Thank you for all that you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Cory Booker
subject: Running for president isn't easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, So many people have stepped up and chipped in to our campaign since we launched our $550,000 effort to reach more caucus-goers and voters in the early states -- and I couldn't be more grateful. But sadly, we're behind where we need to be right now, and we have just two days left to get back on track. **[We still need to raise $212,557 by Friday night -- can you help out by making a donation right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** At this moment, I haven't reached the DNC's thresholds to qualify for the December debate. **The good news is that our team has a plan to earn a spot in that forum** \-- and the only way we can make it real is to reach our goal by the end of the week. **[I'm asking you to help, if you can -- chip in to our Ground Game Fund right now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d75/5fca0d19/79a86d8b/291c7e4b/27534757/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d75/5fca0d19/79a86d8b/291c7e4a/27534757/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d75/5fca0d19/79a86d8b/291c7e49/27534757/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d75/5fca0d19/79a86d8b/291c7e48/27534757/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: this will not be easy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $7,500 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **
**[Please, click here to give $5 or more to help Gary Peters keep Michigan blue, defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89db/2622589458/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMjgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk128-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk128-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=5")** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk128-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk128-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89db/2622589458/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMjgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk128-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
The path to taking back the Senate for Democrats is a tough one. But it runs straight through Michigan, and that's why we need to make supporting Gary a priority. I appreciate you stepping up and being a part of this fight.

Chuck

Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth, and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89d6/2622589458/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer&recurring=1") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89d5/2622589458/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89d7/2622589458/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4b/5721a3ed/7110db30/efa89d6/2622589458/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer&recurring=1") |

name: Michael (personal)
subject: One thing is crystal clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
Donald Trump should never have been elected in the first place. | |
---
| Friends,

Like millions of my fellow Americans, I watched with dismay this morning as senior State Department officials corroborated the alarming and impeachable offenses outlined by an anonymous whistleblower.

These actions are unpresidential and unethical. These hearings make one thing crystal clear: [Donald Trump should never have been elected in the first place.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae34/134673f2/98ed35e/6997db35/2226008846/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B4_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

In just under a year, voters across America will head to the polls and could re-elect the man who is under an impeachment inquiry.

[We only have one shot to beat Donald Trump at the ballot box .](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae34/134673f2/98ed35e/6997db35/2226008846/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B4_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I'm putting in the work it takes to beat Donald Trump next November. I can't do it alone. Will you join me in this fight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae34/134673f2/98ed35e/6997db35/2226008846/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B4_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Other candidates in this race are more concerned with promises they can't fulfill and playing into the media circus, rather than addressing the concerns of the nine million Americans who voted twice for Barack Obama and once for Donald Trump.

This president has displayed a flagrant disregard for the rule of law.

[We have one shot to beat him at the ballot box and we can't afford to mess it up.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae34/134673f2/98ed35e/6997db35/2226008846/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B4_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[My campaign has always been focused on real solutions, not slogans. "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Together, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

| | I have less than 5 hours until the deadline to qualify for the next debates. So I'm asking you to stand with me one last time. **[_If I can get 67 gifts before midnight, I can get my message out to voters in a pivotal moment in the race. Can I count on you to be one of the gifts I badly need? I 've never needed your support more than I do now. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191113_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I need you to know something. I'm not fighting to get on that stage for myself. I'm fighting for the victims of police violence who never received justice. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc825/3eb3e2fc/56b0cd9a/744d98c0/1847032733/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc825/3eb3e2fc/56b0cd9a/744d98cf/1847032733/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Everything you need to know about today’s partisan impeachment stunt
body:
Nineteen minutes after Donald J. Trump was sworn in as America’s 45th President, The Washington Post published this headline on its website... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f11555661e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 13, 2019
---
| | |
# **Everything you need to know about today’s partisan impeachment stunt**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2fc232df0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Nineteen minutes** after Donald J. Trump was sworn in as America’s 45th President, _The Washington Post_ published this headline on its website: “The campaign to impeach President Trump has begun.” For once, anyway, the media was telling it like it is.

**Democrats in Congress** have been selling their far-left base on impeachment since Hillary Clinton lost the 2016 presidential race. After nearly 3 years of coming up empty—including $32 million of taxpayer money spent on the Russia collusion hoax—Democrat leaders knew they needed to do _something_ to appease their party’s left fringe.

**That’s why Speaker Nancy Pelosi** announced the impeachment “inquiry” in a hastily organized press conference—before the full House voted, and before any of the relevant evidence could even come to light. This time, Democrats knew they couldn’t risk letting the facts derail their momentum, as had happened with the Mueller Report flop.

[Watch: The Swamp wanted a media circus, and they got it!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1121447730&e=3ee4985eea)

**House Democrats** are effectively shutting down Congress—yet again—over their impeachment sham. Nothing substantive can get done while the left remains fixated on undoing the 2016 election. They have repeatedly ignored opportunities to work with President Trump and take action on issues that will help the very people they represent.

**The President** continues to push forward on trade deals, healthcare, our booming economy, immigration, and other areas where Americans want real solutions. Democrat leaders, unable to control their far-left fringe, can only stage TV hearings. Meanwhile:
* Speaker Pelosi still refuses to hold a vote on USMCA to replace NAFTA—despite growing pressure from manufacturers, labor unions, farmers, and workers.

* Democrats have failed to come up with _any_ areas where they’ll work with President Trump to lower medicine prices for our families and seniors.

* House Democrats have failed to do anything to help rebuild our country’s crumbling infrastructure.

* They continue to ignore loopholes in our immigration laws that drive the border crisis, fuel human smuggling, and hurt both U.S. citizens and legal immigrants.

**Americans have every right** to be angry. It’s remarkable to think about where our country could be if Democrats in Congress put country before party. Under President Trump, the U.S. economy has hit its lowest unemployment rate in 50 years. Illegal immigration is finally starting to come under control after decades of neglect.

**If House Democrats** were as committed to helping Americans succeed under President Trump as they are to tearing him down, imagine where we could be now.

**Instead, bring in the cameras.** The one bright spot from today’s embarrassing spectacle is that American families finally got front-row seats to how Congress wastes its time—and spends millions of their taxpayer dollars—on partisan stunts. No wonder Americans don’t trust Washington. Who can blame them?

[Don't rely on 2nd, 3rd, and 4th-hand accounts. Read the transcript yourself here.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fae373b2c0&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [Impeachment czar Adam Schiff has lied to Americans—over and over again.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d6b23a618&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=321107bd9e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=93c28579db&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6d5736e36a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Remembering My Mom
body:
A victory belle from the greatest generation. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Remembering My Mom](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-j/)
My mom, Doris Leona Tilley Chabot, passed away a week ago today, at the age of 95. In this week's blog, I remember my Mom, a victory belle from the greatest generation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Camp David](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-d/)
This past weekend I was humbled to be a guest at Camp David. Steeped in mystery, this decades old presidential retreat has an amazing history. In this week's blog, I write about how a place known as Shangri-La became Camp David, and you won't want to miss what I found written in a book in my cabin! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Is Hillary Going to Run Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Hillary is still out there claiming she won the presidential election, and now she's making noises that she might run again in 2020. Besides Hillary, there are also rumors of several other candidates that still might jump into the Democrat's primary pool - Michelle Obama, Oprah? In this week's blog, I let you know what I think of Hillary's and other potential candidate's chances of jumping in. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [When You're The Front-Runner, You're the Target](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-n/)
About two months ago I made a prediction that Elizabeth Warren was the person most likely to be the Democratic nominee for president. Was my prediction correct? This week I discuss why criticisms of Warren's radical policies and ultra-leftist thinking are evidence that this prediction may very well be true. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhjtlkl-kujkulhluu-f/)

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Mike Turner
subject: Impeachment agenda continues...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExMDg1MzYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MTIxMjQxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0).

I stood up and made my concerns very clear: the two first up witnesses offering testimony neither had any contact with the President of the United States on Ukraine or on any issue at all!
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDExMDg1MzYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTIxMjQxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDExMDg1MzYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTIxMjQxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Today, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff pushed their partisan impeachment agenda out and in the open.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Term Limits Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand For America
body:
The time has come to place term limits on our politicians. We have too many Washington politicians who stay in D.C. for 30 or 40 years, and completely lose touch with their constituents.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY2MDAzOTY%3d&x=b410ac6c).

[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/114473/2/)
Friend,
The time has come to place term limits on our politicians. **We have too many Washington politicians who stay in D.C. for 30 or 40 years,** and completely lose touch with their constituents. **These career politicians become indebted to the special interests, and end up voting based on their needs, not based on the issues.**
[**Sign the petition today to show your support for term limits >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/114473/3/)
**D.C. needs new ideas and a fresh perspective** to move our nation forward and be responsive to what Americans want.
The incumbency advantage allows members to perpetually be reelected, because they are **constantly fundraising,** and **building war chests** that **crush the ability of challengers to run competitive campaigns.**
[**Sign the petition today to show your support for term limits >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/114473/4/)
**States across the country have placed term limits on their state legislatures.** They have seen great success in **increasing the number of people running for office.**
**Friend, we need you!** [**Please sign our petition to show your support for term limits and help us fight to bring new ideas to Washington.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/114473/5/)
Thank you.
My very best,
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/114473/6/)

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6600396/136068195/75219/7/)

Paid for by Stand For America
---

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Strength and Opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiMciTq1U63YivVzCVDGI5HIQbhxHOgkv_O0I9eYOgk=/UreRDf_VGI1iQr4zSULJNKHmAWcMYxR0pwcqrVcf80g=)

Dear Supporter,
We are not running with millions of dollars from out of state donors. We are using $10, $20, $100 donations from people all across the state.
We are balancing our campaign with North Carolina Senate legislative duties so that the people of this state can benefit from a better budget that serves our teachers and provides expanded access to healthcare.
Our grassroots canvassing of the state has put me in touch with countless voters who want to be part of something bigger. They feel like outsiders with Thom Tillis in office. I FEEL YOU!!!
I feel what it's like to work two jobs and not have enough money to pay the bills. We have to close the wealth gap.
## [CONTRIBUTE TO OUR CAMPAIGN TO GET ALL OF OUR VOICES BACK TO THE SENATE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiMciTq1U63YivVzCVDGI5HIQbhxHOgkv_O0I9eYOgk=/UreRDf_VGI1iQr4zSULJNKHmAWcMYxR0pwcqrVcf80g=)
I feel what it's like to work all day on the farm and realize your markets have been stripped from you. We have to support investment in agribusiness to get through these tough times.
I feel what it's like to experience a medical emergency and face the mountain of debt that comes with it. I've been there. We have to increase access to universal healthcare.
This is what makes me One of US for All of US. I'm just another, hard working North Carolinian who wants to see REAL change - just like you. Your involvement in the campaign gives me strength because it fuels my desire to give ALL OF US more opportunities.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiMciTq1U63YivVzCVDGI5HIQbhxHOgkv_O0I9eYOgk=/UreRDf_VGI1iQr4zSULJNKHmAWcMYxR0pwcqrVcf80g=)

name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: CLAIRE CHASE BLASTS TORRES SMALL FOR ACCEPTING THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS FROM CHAIRMAN SCHIFF PRIOR TO ANNOUNCING HER SUPPORT FOR IMPEACHMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: November 14, 2019 CONTACT: Bryan Piligra PHONE: (631) 617-1266 EMAIL: info@clairechase.org
---
| CLAIRE CHASE BLASTS TORRES SMALL FOR ACCEPTING THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS FROM CHAIRMAN SCHIFF PRIOR TO ANNOUNCING HER SUPPORT FOR IMPEACHMENT
Chase: "Adam Schiff lining the pockets of vulnerable Democrats who represent districts won decisively by President Trump in 2016, such as Torres Small, in order to secure support for impeachment is the real quid pro quo here."
---
| (Roswell, NM) - Claire Chase, conservative Republican candidate for New Mexico's 2nd Congressional District, today blasted Congresswoman Xochitl Torres Small for accepting thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff prior to announcing her full support for his impeachment inquiry. In a statement released today, Chase deemed their actions "the real quid pro quo" and urged Torres Small to immediately return all campaign contributions to Adam Schiff.
"Adam Schiff lining the pockets of vulnerable Democrats who represent districts won decisively by President Trump in 2016, such as Torres Small, in order to secure support for impeachment is the real quid pro quo here," said Claire Chase. "This proves once and for all that this process has been a partisan-fueled sham from the beginning, and because of it, Adam Schiff has lost all credibility and Torres Small has completely lost the trust of her constituents. If Torres Small has any shred of decency left, she should immediately return the thousands of dollars she took from Adam Schiff and get back to doing her job - not wasting the remaining months she has left in Washington participating in this absurd witch hunt against our President."
---
| ###
---

[The Register-Guard: A Dreamer Moves on from DeFazio ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2wp/chVSAcyvSNSYMGXhP97Lnw/h1/3r-2B9H4kRwZGWVwt8Jac9QlvG9GxBfRmb5QVzQCa5hHOBZme3f1pV3GncuM-2BmeWMfJo8qd8gekQalNiWvqkRGbhY0ZSs3dZSYAAGR2F2adAxqNpW-2FBOYAd2PzEu3nKVWw6f7rCWkQj3M6wJ27hkSu08dG5m4EF4E5nyISStwvQDj0anmeDhqTtJD9mtnHFHOMwy9PdNQW9ULQoc4fZw2GafJvWQc1o1jKIEyCjDp46AQfl2Hsy-2BxdTHufVa9A-2BuMgZXAkSZKUlQUkvFvAysmZoo5-2Ffg4Xs8rTdXDltgg2s9IN5baCdl7u5g8GQVd8z7gDvoA2qHsq6qVE2-2FlGDpVaFHW-2B5ldHvdGs3pgt8-2FfcJDiXTltYGrCR4lpCwxWj8zoupZw4AMuoW9k90O4QUx1gr0HHTwU-2FWvHaD3E0DnqfLLc-3D/pW_3) GUEST VIEW By Jesus Narvaez In 1992, I was born in Tepic, Nayarit, Mexico, and my parents brought me as a child to the United States to make a better life for our family. Today I am a graduate of South Eugene High School, a senior at the University of Oregon, and I am a Dreamer, one of up to 3.6 million people brought to the United States as children, who are fighting for citizenship in the only country we have ever known. As the 2020 election approaches, and Republicans vow to deport me and my neighbors, and as Democrats head out on the campaign trail, people often ask me who I consider a champion for Dreamers and the immigrant community. My response is: someone willing to listen, and take a stand with us. Our 33-year incumbent congressman is not that champion. In 2018, I stood next to Rep. Peter DeFazio at the State of the Union Address in our nation's capital, and I began to realize that he invited me there to create an image of being a champion for Dreamers that he doesn't deserve. Time and time again, he has voted to criminalize people like me and my community. That's why I'm taking a stand. In 1996, when I was 4 years old, Defazio voted with Republicans and the "English only" movement of white nationalists of that time on the Immigrant English Proficiency Amendment, and for the Immigration Reform bill of 1996 that beefed up border patrol and criminalized immigration to the U.S. In 2006, when I was 14, he again sided with Republicans to create the ICE deportation force as we know it today by voting "Yes" on the Immigration Law Enforcement Act, which allowed local law enforcement to act as ICE, fueling racial profiling of Latinx people by local police. In 2011, when I was 19, DeFazio introduced and championed a bill to collect data on immigrant workers in order to deport us, known as "mandatory e-verify." His leadership was celebrated by Numbers USA, an organization the Southern Poverty Law Center calls an "anti-immigrant hate group," founded by white nationalist John Tanton. DeFazio's mandatory e-verify bill was defeated because most Democrats would not support it. Most recently, in 2017, DeFazio was one of only 24 House Democrats to vote with Republicans for a Trump-backed bill that whipped up anti-immigrant racism to criminalize undocumented entry. The so-called "Kate's Law" is opposed by the ACLU as it would put undocumented entrants in prison for up to 10 years. For families like mine, this is a slap in the face from DeFazio at a time when Trump's deportation forces are separating families. Now, when faced with running against Doyle Canning, the first viable Democratic primary challenger DeFazio has ever had in his 33 years in office, he suddenly schedules a press conference to tout his championship for Dreamers. Enough is enough. My community will not stand by a representative who has voted to lock us up as criminals. We need change, and we need a champion. It is time to take a stand, to vote for Doyle Canning, who has been an ally in the fight with immigrant communities against wage theft and abuses of farmworkers, day laborers, and domestic workers. She has taken a stand against "show me your papers" laws in Arizona and Georgia, and fought with communities against the escalation of ICE's collaboration with local law enforcement that encourages racial profiling. Canning has pledged that if elected, she will work to close the camps at the border, reunite families and hold Trump's agents accountable for abuse and mistreatment of immigrants and asylum seekers. She will support immigration reform that treats my community with dignity and respect and work with us to find ways forward. When people ask me who would be a champion for Dreamers, I tell them that it is time for the 4th Congressional District to have a new face in D.C. Someone who works with the community to make sure their worries, and dreams, are heard in the halls of Washington. I tell them to take a stand: on May 19, 2020, vote for Canning for Congress because, as a Dreamer, I can't. There will be a press event at 12 p.m. today at Harris Hall, 125 E. 8th Ave. Jesus Narvaez is a Dreamer, a senior at the University of Oregon and has been a leader in movements for human rights and immigrants rights. He has advised Doyle Canning on how to help the immigrant community and has spoken at her events.

For families like mine, this is a slap in the face from DeFazio at a time when Trump's deportation forces are separating families. Now, when faced with running against Doyle Canning, the first viable Democratic primary challenger DeFazio has ever had in his 33 years in office, he suddenly schedules a press conference to tout his championship for Dreamers. Enough is enough. My community will not stand by a representative who has voted to lock us up as criminals. We need change, and we need a champion. It is time to take a stand, to vote for Doyle Canning, who has been an ally in the fight with immigrant communities against wage theft and abuses of farmworkers, day laborers, and domestic workers. She has taken a stand against "show me your papers" laws in Arizona and Georgia, and fought with communities against the escalation of ICE's collaboration with local law enforcement that encourages racial profiling. Canning has pledged that if elected, she will work to close the camps at the border, reunite families and hold Trump's agents accountable for abuse and mistreatment of immigrants and asylum seekers. She will support immigration reform that treats my community with dignity and respect and work with us to find ways forward. When people ask me who would be a champion for Dreamers, I tell them that it is time for the 4th Congressional District to have a new face in D.C. Someone who works with the community to make sure their worries, and dreams, are heard in the halls of Washington. I tell them to take a stand: on May 19, 2020, vote for Canning for Congress because, as a Dreamer, I can't. There will be a press event at 12 p.m. today at Harris Hall, 125 E. 8th Ave. Jesus Narvaez is a Dreamer, a senior at the University of Oregon and has been a leader in movements for human rights and immigrants rights. He has advised Doyle Canning on how to help the immigrant community and has spoken at her events. | ]() Saturday in Coos Bay : Grassroots Organizing Training Do you want to build the movement for real progressive change in our district? Learn the ropes of how elections are won and lost? And learn lasting skills to build political power? We're building this movement from the ground up and we're supporting the South Coast, who has been leading the fight to stop the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline and export project for 15 years. Join us for a two hour training on the basics of organizing winning electoral campaigns: 1\. Connecting your story with this campaign 2\. Making an ask and following through 3\. Scaling our campaign to contact thousands of voters. Saturday November 16th, 6-8 pm Reply to this email to RSVP for location! | | | HOUSE PARTIES ARE HAPPENING So many supporters are opening their homes Friday 11/15 in Eugene Monday 11/18 in Walton Friday 11/22 in Eugene Saturday 11/23 in Corvallis Wednesday 12/4 in Roseburg Thursday 12/5 in Springfield Sunday 12/8 in Portland Reply to this email to get more info on any of these events. | JOIN US IN SALEM NEXT THURSDAY NOVEMBER 21 Canning for Congress will be joining Oregonians from across the district to send a clear message to Governor Brown and all of our political leaders - Now is the time to take a stand and say it loud and clear: #STOPJORDANCOVE. Gather at 11 am at the state capitol and bring your Take a Stand signs, buttons and lots of friends! | APPLY : FELLOWSHIP APPLICATIONS ROLLING DEADLINE Your movement, your campaign. Join us as a Fellow this fall! This is an unpaid opportunity available to anyone with interest in getting Doyle elected, civic engagement, and political campaigning. You do NOT need to be a student to participate! We are recruiting fellows across the district, from Coos Bay to Corvallis. Learn more at | APPLY : NOW HIRING FINANCE STAFF & ORGANIZERS Interviews are rolling now and positions are open until filled, so don't wait. The is tasked with developing a finance and fundraising plan through the 2020 election. are responsible for recruiting and training a community of volunteers to interact directly with voters. We plan to expand at year's end, so if you are interested in working on this campaign in 2020, we also welcome resumes at apply@canningforcongress.com | | | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

N/A,

Since announcing my re-election campaign for Sheriff of Maricopa County, things have yet to go as expected.

And with less than 48 hours until my critical November mid-month fundraising deadline, **[I need 350 grassroots conservatives to support my campaign before midnight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53474746:si4QCsvXN:m:1:2105898951:AB334846FC791D8B1A40FB0744E7D2B7:r)** - or I will be forced to drop out.

Democrats think me campaigning on my old school, tough as nails approach to keeping America safe **_is helpless_** against their progressive agenda.

Man are they wrong.

Our country is desperate for proven leaders, like myself, to step up and take the challenges we're facing head on.

But in order for me to win this race, build the Wall, and END the immigration crisis riddling our country - **[I need to hear from you before my midnight deadline.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53474746:si4QCsvXN:m:1:2105898951:AB334846FC791D8B1A40FB0744E7D2B7:r)**

name: Dr. Ralph Reed
subject: Please sign the national Protect My Values Pledge
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==) Fellow Patriot, As pro-family Christians, our rights, our values, and our liberties are under attack. Since President Trump has been in the Oval Office, the left has proposed and passed radical legislation aimed at expanding abortion access, even allowing the murder of newborn babies after they take their first breath. Liberals have sued Bible-believing Americans and tried to force them to violate their conscience. Namely, radicals have been focused on taking away the rights of Christians who believe in Biblical marriage and imposing their extremist views on these Americans of faith. **They 've also recently claimed that the Bible promotes socialism, to which I boldly proclaimed on Fox News that the Bible is not "a religious Communist manifesto" and Jesus was NOT a "Birkenstock-wearing socialist."** Along with attacking life and religious liberties, liberals have also threatened families by insisting that boys have a right to be in girls' restrooms, locker rooms, and on their sports teams. They've even taken children away from families when parents haven't paid for their youngsters to take drugs that would alter their hormones. **[Liberals across the nation will stop at nothing until they've trampled on every pro-life, pro-religious liberty, pro-family value that you and I cherish. That's why I need your signature today on the national Protect My Values Pledge.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==)** [ **Sign the Pledge** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==) Our goal at Faith & Freedom Coalition is to get 1 MILLION signatures on this pledge from Christians across our nation. This pledge will tell politicians, candidates, and legislators that you expect your Christian, pro-family, pro-life, pro-religious liberty values to be protected and upheld! **As we march on toward 2020, the radical left is going to be attacking our shared values in ways we 've never seen. Their policies are going to be increasingly liberal in order to show a stark contrast between President Trump and any of their 2020 candidates.** However, the radical left has realized that they can no longer kick voters of faith in the teeth and call us "deplorable" if they expect to win over some Americans of faith in 2020. But mark my words -- the primary items under attack in the year ahead will be life, family, and religious liberty -- regardless of how they try to spin the Bible or speak to Americans of faith at campaign rallies. **[That is why we need your signature today -- to help us fight back!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==)** The Faith & Freedom Coalition believes that the greatness of America lies not in the federal government but in the character of our people -- the simple virtues of faith, hard work, marriage, family, personal responsibility, and helping the least among us. **Never before has it been more critical for us to speak out for these values, particularly religious liberty, protecting innocent life, and preserving the traditional family.** People of faith, including our Founding Fathers, understood that our rights come from God, and not government, but liberals in Washington today disagree. They want the government to strip rights from Christians that were granted to us by our Creator and enshrined in our Constitution by our Founding Fathers. That is why we work every day at Faith & Freedom Coalition to protect the First Amendment rights of Christians and other Americans of conscience and faith, uphold the rights of the unborn, and ensure that pro-family values are at the forefront of our nation's policy decisions. **[With your signature today, we can show national support for the values we honor-- life, family, and religious liberty. Please sign the Protect My Values Pledge right away.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==)** [ **Sign the Pledge** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kuzJj_x7rmEGTvtcEmMbdf_H0UxJHrdYV4ZeAqES91vCdfh1G4zpUMa7YOO-Zgn6oaeGUK1QwHeL1JT143UWWi9xPl5-Eu8Bzsqw9ykYtpHNgZoLmBwUXgwlLvAA-9Y4u35ci8rh3EfHRMoWsbi1nuSkBiDs3ixd-Ff6rbHHlZeO5x-wnlpG8otjyJhHpQk_OaNMeZnonE8=&c=AET_ggNfWEtWEHP_ZKZZULbEjPYemrIDRLrFG9NgLyQ-B2g-urRvPg==&ch=FN7vaqLm2hyTyO0gUsIZ7zDKIysW624asGY20kk4UzSZv22AIY8AyQ==) Thank you for your support! name: Tom Szymanski, Campaign Manager
subject: The Lewis Newsletter - Backing the Iron Range
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
Team Lewis here checking in with all the latest updates! What a great couple of weeks on the road. Last week, Jason gave a speech to packed rooms of supporters at events hosted by the Itasca & Pine County Republicans.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/bf783cb86906bd83/e021d1ebfec8e160c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Hi Friends, Team Lewis here checking in with all the latest updates! What a great couple of weeks on the road. Last week, Jason gave a speech to packed rooms of supporters at events hosted by the Itasca & Pine County Republicans. Jason’s message was simple- he is taking on the tough fights that our opponent Senator Tina Smith is either ignoring or adamantly opposed to--like fighting for mining and mineral rights on the Iron Range, backing the timber industry and Enbridge Line 3 project, fighting for our 2nd Amendment Rights, working to secure the border and fighting to protect innocent life. But don’t take my word for it. Jason followed that up with a “Miners’ Meet’n’Greet” in Virginia on Monday evening, where we met with many folks who are getting involved in the political process for the very first time, many of them former Democrats who feel left behind by Tina Smith and the radical Democrats. On Tuesday, Congressman Pete Stauber joined Jason for a tour of the United Taconite iron ore facilities in Forbes and Virginia. It was an honor to see firsthand how Minnesota iron ore is extracted and produced and to meet the men and women who make it happen. After that, Jason met with some key members of the Minnesota logging and timber industry on a job site in Cotton. For generations, timber and logging has been the lifeblood of the local economy in the North Woods. Sadly, the industry has been going through tough times in recent years and is in need of new markets. One of those is something called forest biomass—which utilizes forest feedstock for renewable energy production and in the process reduces the dangers of wildfires. As you can see, a lot of exciting things happening with the Lewis campaign with more fun & exciting things upcoming! In fact, mark your calendars for December 19th for the first ever “Don’t Make it a ‘Blue Christmas’” Holiday Party featuring none other than the King of Rock ‘n Roll himself! Make certain your email is registered at [LewisForMN.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/bf783cb86906bd83/c6641ded7ff5a711c3d6b838967d376c/33183) to get further updates on what’s sure to be a fun evening. Thanks for all your ongoing support, we’ll see you on the trail soon! Tom Szymanski, Campaign Manager | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/bf783cb86906bd83/175fdf338a9d0697c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/bf783cb86906bd83/e6bef5eba9a2e63ac3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/bf783cb86906bd83/254c48e96088a7f5c3d6b838967d376c/33183)
---|---|---
|

| Friend, here's what the debate stages have looked like so far: **FIRST:** The DNC required that each candidate have 130,000 individual donors to qualify for the September and October debates -- and twelve candidates made it on stage. **I was one of them.** **THEN:** They raised the threshold to 165,000 individual donors to qualify for the November debate -- and ten candidates qualified. **I was one of them.** **NOW:** They raised the threshold to 200,000 individual donors for the December debate, and so far only six candidates have secured their spot. _**I 'm not one of them.**_ This is not an easy requirement to meet, but I believe that we can get there. Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Amy Klobuchar have all qualified for the December debate. My team tells me we're fewer than 15,000 donors away. **Will you help me join my colleagues on stage by chipping in whatever you can -- even $1 counts -- to become one of the donors who gets me on the December debate stage?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191114_CB_20191114-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

name: TULSI 2020
subject: Every. Single. Day.
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11860534/121279521/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI3OGE1MC0xNjA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UswG8_drY9MPec0rrQH39cfWZKZJsLqdrT9KqISyBM0=&emci=28117bfc-0d07-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e278a50-1607-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Friend — This week Tulsi joined voices around the nation in paying tribute to our veterans. Candidates blasted out their annual campaign email honoring those who served, politicians posed for photo opps with service members and then spoke of wars they themselves wrote the check to wage. **Tulsi doesn’t need a national holiday to remind her of the cost of war.** Tulsi honors our veterans EVERY single day of our campaign by standing alone in calling on both parties to stop engaging in regime change wars and to end the new Cold War and nuclear arms race. Tulsi has dedicated her entire adult life to putting service above self. As a soldier, a veteran, a member of Congress. As the lone voice on one debate stage after another speaking politically unpopular truths to power about the reckless and wasteful foreign policies perpetuated by both parties. About the true cost of war. [We’re less than two weeks out from November’s presidential debate in Atlanta and we need to make sure Tulsi’s message of peace and a government truly of, by and for the people is louder than ever.**Will you chip-in $1 right now and show Tulsi you’re up for this fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11860536/121279523/719197034?refcode=em191106_ask&amount=15&refcode2=9e278a50-1607-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI3OGE1MC0xNjA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UswG8_drY9MPec0rrQH39cfWZKZJsLqdrT9KqISyBM0=) | [DONATE $1 » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11860545/121279532/547601035?refcode=em191113_button2&amount=1&refcode2=9e278a50-1607-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI3OGE1MC0xNjA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UswG8_drY9MPec0rrQH39cfWZKZJsLqdrT9KqISyBM0= "Donate $1")
---
Tulsi has been the lone candidate bravely taking on the military industrial complex every single day since long before she announced her candidacy for President, but she’s not alone. She’s got all of us, and we’re not quieting down anytime soon. Not when we know $4 billion is still being spent in Afghanistan every month on a failed nation building strategy. Not when our President is inching us closer and closer to nuclear catastrophe. Not when both party establishments work for the American war machine.
The story of our movement is summed up in Tulsi’s Veteran's Day message of service, sacrifice, courage, love of country and the humanity that binds us all together. This is who she is, and it’s why she’s running.
Will you take a minute today to show your support and give Tulsi the loudest platform possible so she can keep raising our voices?
We can do this, friend. Thank you.
TULSI 2020

clean_body: | | | | Friend — This week Tulsi joined voices around the nation in paying tribute to our veterans. Candidates blasted out their annual campaign email honoring those who served, politicians posed for photo opps with service members and then spoke of wars they themselves wrote the check to wage. Tulsi doesn’t need a national holiday to remind her of the cost of war. Tulsi honors our veterans EVERY single day of our campaign by standing alone in calling on both parties to stop engaging in regime change wars and to end the new Cold War and nuclear arms race. Tulsi has dedicated her entire adult life to putting service above self. As a soldier, a veteran, a member of Congress. As the lone voice on one debate stage after another speaking politically unpopular truths to power about the reckless and wasteful foreign policies perpetuated by both parties. About the true cost of war. = | = "Donate $1" Tulsi has been the lone candidate bravely taking on the military industrial complex every single day since long before she announced her candidacy for President, but she’s not alone. She’s got all of us, and we’re not quieting down anytime soon. Not when we know $4 billion is still being spent in Afghanistan every month on a failed nation building strategy. Not when our President is inching us closer and closer to nuclear catastrophe. Not when both party establishments work for the American war machine. The story of our movement is summed up in Tulsi’s Veteran's Day message of service, sacrifice, courage, love of country and the humanity that binds us all together. This is who she is, and it’s why she’s running. Will you take a minute today to show your support and give Tulsi the loudest platform possible so she can keep raising our voices? We can do this, friend. Thank you. TULSI 2020 = "Donate $1" | | PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707 The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. body:

---|---|---
**[CHIP IN](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a0/53d9897e/53debba4/1c891efc/3892076970/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-48hrgoalnd?refcode=20191114nd__332__&refcode2=top&amount=5")**

**Derek, we need you to step up. Mark needs 100 new donors in the next 48 hours in order to stay on track for the month!** Since the 2019 elections are over and we're about to head into 2020, this is a crucial goal.

In case you haven't heard, there are a lot of signs telling us that this will be a tough race:
* One of Mark's opponents said the VA Senate seat is a **_" top three pickup"_** in 2020.
* This same opponent is also claiming he's within **_" striking distance"_** of taking down Mark.
* And Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight recently ranked Virginia's partisan lean as only **_D+0.1!_**

The good news is that we do have a path to retake the Senate next year, but it's a narrow one and it runs right through Virginia. If Mark loses re-election (and remember he only won in 2014 by **_0.8%_**), our chances of electing a blue Senate go to almost zero.

body:
Last night, I appeared on Tucker Carlson’s show to talk about New York’s radical bail “reform” law that takes effect on January 1st.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=36A41A1A370)

| | **Friends-

** Last night, I appeared on Tucker Carlson’s show to talk about New York’s radical bail "reform" law that takes effect on January 1st.

Passed by the Democrats who control state government in Albany, it eliminates cash bail for dozens of serious crimes like assault, strangulation, harming children, dealing drugs and even some homicides.

[Watch my appearance w/ Tucker Carlson:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=36A41A1A371)

---
| | |

| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=36A41A1A371)
---
| | |
---
| | This new bail law also protects illegal immigrants charged with these crimes from federal immigration detainer orders—taking us further down the road toward being a Sanctuary State.

And instead of bail, Bill de Blasio plans to give these defendants tickets to the Mets and the movies to get them to return for their court date.

Please watch the video, share it with your friends, and contact Governor Cuomo's office today at (212) 681-4580.

Sincerely,
Nicole
