name: Wendy Davis
subject: [urgent petition] Stand with DREAMers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
---
| | Friends, This goes against everything our country stands for: The conservative-packed Supreme Court is set to rule in President Trump's favor -- allowing him to eliminate protections for nearly 700,000 DREAMers who were brought to the United States as children.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Friends, This goes against everything our country stands for: [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/3990018f/1431400081/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1") The conservative-packed Supreme Court is set to rule in President Trump's favor -- allowing him to eliminate protections for **nearly 700,000 DREAMers** who were brought to the United States as children. **This issue strikes at the very core of who we are as Americans and the values that we hold dear.** As a nation of immigrants, we _must_ hold true to our deeply held ideal that if you are willing to work hard and play by the rules, you deserve to get ahead. [**Here in Texas, y 'all means ALL. We must fight for the hard-working young immigrants who call our country home -- sign our urgent petition to call on Congress to take action to protect DREAMers!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/3990018e/1431400081/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+Here+in+Texas+yrsquoall+means+ALL+We+mus&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1") | ****| ****| **[Add Your Name](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/39900181/1431400081/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1")**
---
DACA is supported by an overwhelming majority of Americans from across the political spectrum -- **because the American people know that DREAMers make rich contributions to our communities, our economy, and our cultural fabric.**
As a mother and a grandmother, I refuse to stand by as President Trump attempts to steal away the very futures of young men and women who've done all they were asked, who deserve the chance to fulfill their dreams.
[**Stand with DREAMers: Add your name to demand Congress pass legislation to protect DACA!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/39900180/1431400081/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=4+-+Stand+with+DREAMers+Add+your+name+to+dem&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1")
****| ****| **[Sign On](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/39900183/1431400081/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=5+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1")**
---
We won't let Trump use our immigrant brothers and sisters as political pawns in his cruel, xenophobic agenda.
We must speak out,
Wendy

| [ ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b7c/704929dc/16634754/39900182/1431400081/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_template?refcode=dav_footerlogo_ab&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=6+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191113_ProtectDreamers_U2_X1")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hello Peter, While all eyes are turned to the impeachment proceedings, we can't forget about all the lasting damage Trump is inflicting on our planet. Numerous areas across the globe are experiencing unprecedented warming events that threaten entire ecosystems, especially our seas and fisheries. And all the while, Trump is unraveling a slew of environmental regulations in favor of corporate profits, making the whole situation far, far worse. The future of our planet is on the ballot in 2020, so we need to hear what engaged voters think: **Are you worried about the environment with Trump in office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0d/6e9863e8/164557be/1db0944e/4046379582/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/c2qUoYdV") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0d/6e9863e8/164557be/1db0944e/4046379582/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/c2qUoYdV") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0d/6e9863e8/164557be/1db0944d/4046379582/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191114a.ND-b&refcode2=2BF81sluvQnLwXIkyWuU")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Adam Schiff is Wasting the Nation’s Time with Impeachment Hearings
body:
“In their first day of public impeachment hearings, Democrats made clear just how weak their case is,” the New York Post editorial board writes. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48932dcc95&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Adam Schiff is Wasting the Nation’s Time with Impeachment Hearings**

“In their first day of public impeachment hearings, Democrats made clear just how weak their case is,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

In mostly dull, uneventful testimony yesterday, Democrats’ “star” witnesses openly complained about policy decisions they disliked. “Sorry, but it’s not their place to second-guess Trump or his policies. The president sets foreign policy, not they.”

Most revealing: Rather than offer any actual evidence at all, “they merely cited third- and fourth-hand rumors. Neither man ever had direct contact with the president.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=390e7c05b8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Just like with the left’s two-year Russia collusion chase, the facts do not match Democrats’ narrative. “Now, Democrats have moved from their earlier charge of ‘quid pro quo’ to wild allegations of ‘abuse of power,’ ‘extortion’ and ‘bribery.’ When the proof falls short, they continue to shift the goal posts from one unsubstantiated allegation to another,” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d260ff0d0b&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Adam Schiff’s opening statement reminded me that Ukraine is a problem for the United States today because Russia invaded it during the Obama administration.” In 2014, Russia invaded the Crimean peninsula on President Obama’s watch—after he promised Russia “flexibility” in his second term. For the next two years, the Obama administration refused to provide lethal aid to Ukraine despite Kiev pleading for help, Scott Jennings writes for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b0098fb01&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “While Washington is often dominated by partisan gridlock, Congress can put politics aside and improve the everyday lives of Americans by approving the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA), a trade deal that would replace the outdated North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA).” This deal “will become the new gold standard against which all future trade deals are measured,” former Rep. Erik Paulsen (R-MN) and Gary Locke write for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e35d05acfd&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The White House is inviting lawmakers to its first summit on paid family leave and childcare affordability next month,” Francesca Chambers reports. “Never before has this issue had so much support and momentum, on both sides of the aisle,” Ms. Trump told _[McClatchy DC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d7b603ada&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df8e1727b4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=546e4a38f1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=42d9b42516)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
| |
---
| Team: Did you see this message from Ed? Democrats are rallying together to say NO to Trump's attacks on emission standards that have helped to reduce carbon pollution.

_**[_**Will you join us and sign the petition to tell Trump to STOP the rollbacks on auto emission standards? Click here to add your name!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:****
* * *

_**[_**SIGN ON: Tell Donald Trump to stop attacking auto emission standards!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_
Team,

When President Obama used my legislation to raise emission standards to 55.5/mpg by 2025, we were on a course to drastically reduce the harmful emissions from automobiles.

But now, President Trump is rolling back that law. Under Big Oil's agenda, Trump and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell are doing everything they can to undermine our progress to combat the climate crisis.

We should be increasing emission standards, not lowering them to help corporate polluters' bottom line.

_**_**[That's why Democrats across the country are taking a stand to say STOP the rollbacks on auto emission standards. Will you join me and sign our petition today and make your voice heard?](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")****_
Rolling back vehicle emission standards will cause a severe increase in carbon emissions in our atmosphere, which will:

* Accelerate the climate crisis;
* Increase the risk of chronic illness, such as cardiovascular disease and mental health disorders among vulnerable populations, primarily young kids and communities of color;
* Introduce more pollutants and carcinogens to the air we breathe;
* Undermine the fuel economy standard, costing consumers billions of dollars.

The federal government should not be sacrificing our families and our future to protect corporate polluters and Big Oil.

_**_**[Take a stand and sign our petition today to tell Donald Trump to stop the rollbacks of emission standards!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df77/693b8b0a/43fd1321/72de797b/2676056399/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")****_
Thanks,

Ed

"" Begin Forward from Ed Markey:** "" Team, When President Obama used my legislation to raise emission standards to 55.5/mpg by 2025, we were on a course to drastically reduce the harmful emissions from automobiles. But now, President Trump is rolling back that law. Under Big Oil's agenda, Trump and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell are doing everything they can to undermine our progress to combat the climate crisis. We should be increasing emission standards, not lowering them to help corporate polluters' bottom line. "" ""** Thanks, Ed | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

Friend \-- we’ve got exciting news! **We were just endorsed by The League of Conservation Voters** \-- the leading grassroots advocacy group committed to advancing policies that protect our environment. It’s no secret the climate change deniers have corrupted Washington and prevented our country from taking critical steps to protect our environment. **But that’s why now more than ever, we need leaders in Congress willing to prioritize clean air and water.** [**Can you join LCV in supporting our campaign by making a donation of $ 10 or more?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11865776/121327064/1156503122?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM1OGVlNi0yYzA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Af4D9cZCFIDYMrabv6FHjQo-ZuIJEfup2tMUIQOnXbI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11865777/121327065/1119549850?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM1OGVlNi0yYzA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Af4D9cZCFIDYMrabv6FHjQo-ZuIJEfup2tMUIQOnXbI=) After the 2018 Red Tide crisis, we saw the effects of decades of inaction and an inexcusable lack of environmental protection. Florida’s economy and communities depend on maintaining healthy coastlines and waters. [**Water is our most precious natural resource. I will fight to protect our water every day as your Congresswoman. But to do so, I need your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11865778/121327066/1156503122?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM1OGVlNi0yYzA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Af4D9cZCFIDYMrabv6FHjQo-ZuIJEfup2tMUIQOnXbI=) We know special interests groups will be spending millions trying to keep people like Vern Buchanan in Congress who support dangerous environmental policies and put money over people. **LCV is active in bringing powerful voices that support our environment to Washington to introduce policies that support clean air, water, and our economy. ** [**Join LCV and our campaign today in the fight for our environment and donate $ 10 or more right now! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11865779/121327067/1156503122?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM1OGVlNi0yYzA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Af4D9cZCFIDYMrabv6FHjQo-ZuIJEfup2tMUIQOnXbI=) Thank you for your support in the fight for our future, Margaret

We need YOUR help as we head out to El Paso, TX November 23, 2019 to host a Border Patrol Appreciation Day. We will be preparing 60 turkeys to deliver to the 4 Border Patrol Stations in El Paso. We need YOUR help to purchase sides and ALL the other items needed to make this a special meal for them. Any Amount will help BUT we are asking for at least $10 from ALL our members. 85% of our Border Patrol agents are Hispanic and we NEED to show them that WE care! In the midst of a government shut down WE MUST honor and appreciate their work. There is no OTHER time more appropriate to do this than Thanksgiving. This will complete OUR Texas tour! We have held Border Patrol Appreciation Days in McAllen, Laredo, and now El Paso!

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The first federal campaign banned by Social Media
body:
Election season has started, and with that, the first blatant case of election interference has hit the 2020 Election.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-4718031-003978cf41-b750d16a87)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-4718030-e93dc4e08f-b750d16a87) Election season has started, and with that, the first blatant case of election interference has hit the 2020 Election.

And it didn’t come from Russia . . . **it came from Menlo Park, California, home to Facebook**.

Hundreds of millions of dollars will be spent on Facebook to promote candidates because it's an efficient and targeted way to reach voters.

Even President Trump knows this, and that's why his campaign spent $304,722 on Facebook advertising **in the LAST WEEK**.

But in less than 24 hours of creating the official “Laura Loomer for Congress” Facebook page, my account was BANNED.

That’s right, **I became the first federal candidate to have their campaign page banned on Social Media** . . . yet another record for me.

While my opponents advertise on Facebook . . . reaching voters and donors as you read this message . . . my campaign cannot.

Here’s what happened:

On Monday, we created the official “Laura Loomer for Congress” Facebook page.

On Tuesday, the page was banned.

Thankfully, I've hired the best staff in the business with direct contacts to Facebook.

Within 19 minutes of my page being banned (and with pressure from my staff), my page was reinstated but with no explanation.

**But they’re STILL playing games and interfering with my ability to reach voters and supporters like you.**

Despite them putting my page back up, **I cannot advertise**. Facebook says they "couldn't find public records to match your information."

Really?

We know that’s a blatant lie, as we saved a screenshot of our FEC information appearing on Facebook’s page.

While we're trying to get that resolved, I'm dead set on finding a way to reach Florida voters online, in the most cost-effective way possible.

But that still takes money.

[**Will you help with an emergency donation today so we can continue reaching voters and supporters?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-4718030-e93dc4e08f-b750d16a87)

I knew this fight wouldn't be easy, and I would have to put in extra work to unseat my radical Democrat opponent. I'm willing to, I’m going to, [**and I ask that you stand with me by making an emergency donation today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-4718030-e93dc4e08f-b750d16a87).

I'll shoot you an update tomorrow with any more details on Facebook's actions, but in the meantime, [**please donate**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-4718030-e93dc4e08f-b750d16a87). After you do, I'll share my campaign Facebook page (since I’m personally banned from Facebook), and I hope you'll follow my campaign page.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-353533-823353-84585d41bbe610b-b750d16a87)

---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I know my opponents are relishing this freeze.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7560?t=3&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5) Friend, One month from today, we're done with fundraising for almost FOUR months -- no more fundraising until next spring. **That's why tonight's deadline is a big one: We have an ambitious goal of $25,000 by midnight, and we're $7,389 short.** [**A grassroots donation matters so much right now, because the clock's ticking: Will you donate $1 or more before our midnight deadline?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7560?t=5&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7561?t=6&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7562?t=7&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7563?t=8&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7564?t=9&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7565?t=10&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7566?t=11&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---
Look, the intent behind this fundraising freeze is a good thing -- but it also puts my campaign at an honest-to-goodness disadvantage that we need to be prepared for. Just last week, we saw two conservative statewide initiatives pass at the ballot. And if there is anything I know about politics it is this -- you must not take any election for granted.
We've made such progress here, but there's still so much to do. We're setting the bar high for the rest of the country, from public options on our health care to historic progress in the fight against climate change. It all starts here.
That's why I know Republicans are relishing this chance to fundraise to unseat me while we can't lift a finger. It's a real thing -- our opponents will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars while we can't raise a single cent.
**This is make-or-break -- the clock is ticking, and it's running down. We need to be prepared for the fight ahead:** [**Will you donate $1 or more before our midnight deadline ahead of the legislative fundraising freeze?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7560?t=13&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7560?t=14&akid=7986%2E868730%2Ew1_nQ5)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I'm not afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**This a long email. I 'm asking you to please read the entire thing, and then join me in speaking truth to power.**_ I was the only candidate on the debate stage who called victims of police brutality by name. I was the only candidate on the debate stage who acknowledged gun violence is a white supremacy issue. I was the only candidate on the debate stage with the courage to say our primary system doesn't empower the votes of black women. I was the only candidate on the debate stage who knows what it's like to be from a Latinx immigrant family in the age of Trump. I've been fighting for what others are afraid to tackle for this entire campaign. Yet as a result, the media and the establishment have stifled our bold ideas. [**_I 'm demanding that every Democratic candidate take a stance on each of these issues. If you agree, will you sign my petition before midnight and join me in demanding answers? >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b55/4187749442/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b1_castro_all") At every turn, our progressive agenda shaped this race. I won't let this movement or our voices be silenced. | Please sign your name alongside mine before midnight and demand that all candidates directly answer questions about the issues most important to us and our families. [**_Sign your name next to mine now. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b55/4187749442/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b1_castro_all")
---

Thank you,

Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b54/4187749442/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b53/4187749442/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b52/4187749442/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b51/4187749442/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b50/4187749442/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc828/3eb3e2fc/56b705d0/744d9b5f/4187749442/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

Team, It’s no secret that all eyes are on PA-10. Since the _Washington Post, National Journal, Roll Call,_ and _Cook Political Report_ have all listed Scott Perry as one of the most vulnerable members of Congress, outside groups and special interests are looking to throw everything they have into this race in order to maintain the status quo and keep their “yes” man around.

_But it doesn’t have to be that way, team._ There is a real opportunity to flip this seat and send the kind of leader -- like Eugene! -- to Congress that Pennsylvanians deserve. **This is why your grassroots support is crucially important.**

[**In order to keep the momentum on our side and stay on track to hit our monthly fundraising goal, we need to raise $4,000 in grassroots donations before the end of this week. Can you commit to donating $5, $15, or $25 to help us make up ground? body:
Democrats are rushing to impeach President Trump before the end of the year. The Senate could be the last line of defense.

Friend,

**First:** Pelosi caved to far-left radicals and called for President Trump to be impeached without waiting for any evidence.

**Then:** 231 Angry Democrats voted to move forward with impeachment and have been holding closed-door meetings and cherry-picking information to leak to the liberal media.

**Now:** Democrats aren't allowing Republicans to call witnesses to defend President Trump and aren't giving Republicans a voice in this impeachment process.

If Pelosi and her far-left Democrats push forward with this partisan impeachment, the Republican Senate Majority could be the last line of defense. Pelosi, Schiff, and the radical left have their marching orders from their progressive donors. They are going to use everything they can to try to bring down President Trump and his allies. **_They will never stop unless YOU stop them._** [**Rush an immediate 4x-matched contribution now >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uMsudnOWK2t6J461baWxJvrV92-4i1OUQLPXRxWb7zCmAIJmEvmVWjeYpHq9yKzi0T-RqVHfV-gX2zMJ49Mi6swVWNpMQUWCrCAv16NyMmQcCnVvaRBXOS5raKHdjGVpO_mDKyYmINcNfgAiXMp5Lm0iVqoR4wM66iNMoGRP8Y27YHv8IeGVPxJOFp1cyu33lcNsBiH3fc2eQDAGlGrJ6YspnJqcx1UK2oq5t7U6mifUNca0E0g4P51oIlYRZIHDGO_cdR9rxa4p6MMVmU2_NazCImINTRt_bA_QywJZRukliYj7MmCj6IUBGzYbfMAvgAeuXEaCt3qRw-MltA1wWejjQ1SjlBCVxWh-qWdd4wao3KBmMqt1NEr3KUZxkN9CVlYZVe2vTQnPy0dqWj3-rVLSYkCpVwu-fpsSDcWG4kWMgOXb3R5Upg==&c=zI_FbKtRpL6XokzwG3Ha3b2zkJ5Q28Egwj0ntHTqDDwMnBUAUai1pw==&ch=tMRxbBOgzL3Ce5_BYycPeRb3FNb-QSVZtVcn2lMKuNXjULJIIeTrfw==)

President Trump is delivering on his promises. Where Democrats have failed Americans, Republicans' policies have created a booming economy and job market. **Democrats think that without this one-sided impeachment attempt, they wouldn 't be able to stop President Trump from Making America Great Again for 4 more years.**

We are less than a year away, but 231 Democrats don't want to risk Americans voting against their far-left agenda. They are rushing to impeach as fast as possible. == Thank you for joining the fight, NRSC == If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. T&C/Privacy Policy: == | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | NRSC | 425 2nd St. NE, Washington, DC 20002 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We hit $1 million -- thanks to you, Yang Gang!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Our ad will stay on the air for another week because you and the Yang Gang stepped up once again.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3106%2E377263%2EOK3ie0) I hope you're celebrating, Yang Gang, because I certainly am! We hit our $1 million goal last night, allowing us to keep our ad on the air AND we were able to launch new ads that are live right now in New Hampshire. **Your support and energy put us over the top and you deserve all the credit for getting us there.**

Many candidates are slowing down, saying that November is on record to be a slow fundraising month. And we’re seeing stories about candidates forced to scale back.

**But not us. From this point on, it's full steam ahead. Thanks to you.**

Because of your support, we're building up our organizing and outreach in early states, reaching more voters, and making big moves to ensure we climb in the polls.

The Yang Gang continues to show that we will not be ignored -- despite the media and establishment downplaying this movement -- and this is the team that will keep us going all the way to the White House.

Thank you for building this movement,

-Andrew | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16800?t=5&akid=3106%2E377263%2EOK3ie0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3106%2E377263%2EOK3ie0) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3106%2E377263%2EOK3ie0) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

| Friends,

Polling shows that the majority of Democratic voters are still undecided, with three months until the first ballots are cast.

Since Michael hasn't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning about him.

But it's clear that the more voters learn about Michael, the more they like him. Recently he has TIED with Kamala Harris and Cory Booker in early state polling!

[We've set an ambitious goal to raise $15,OOO by midnight Friday to keep building this campaign, knocking on doors, and reaching undecided voters.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae30/134673f2/9810d6f/6997ddde/1233667820/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Congress: Healthcare is a right!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The run-up to the 2020 Democratic primary has heavily featured the candidates' differing plans to achieve our shared healthcare goals: ensuring that every American is covered, that healthcare costs don't bankrupt our families, and that we get the treatment we deserve. MEANWHILE, the GOP is doing everything it can to undermine the progress we've made. They've never stopped trying to repeal the ACA in Congress AND in the courts, leaving no safety net for people with pre-existing conditions and harming the health of millions. The only reason we didn't lose our healthcare in 2017 was that America spoke up and flooded congressional offices with calls and emails and letters demanding their representatives and senators do their jobs and not play political games with our healthcare. [**But we are at another turning point -- and we need everyone to stand up and make their voices heard if we 're going to finally make healthcare a human right in this country. If you agree that we need to stop treating healthcare like a political pawn, then please add your name to ours.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0b/6e9863e8/16468513/1db09452/1176793994/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0b/6e9863e8/16468513/1db09452/1176793994/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---
|

Washington, DC 20003

body:
We're less than three months away from when caucusing and voting starts, and while that may seem like a long time, it's actually no time at all. For our campaign and our movement, the next few... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528991/45c30650/105688dcc/66f40eb1/117714156/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're less than three months away from when caucusing and voting starts, and while that may seem like a long time, it's actually no time at all. **For our campaign and our movement, the next few weeks are going to be absolutely critical. Here's why:**

What happens in these next few weeks will help set the game plan for our campaign in 2020. If we drop the ball now, there may not be time to pick it up again. There aren't always redos, second tries, or next times.

Simply put, it's going to take an incredible amount of resources to get this done. And, in order to raise what it'll take to win in the first caucuses and primaries, we need to hit our fundraising goals this month.

**It's the middle of the month and we're short of where we need to be to hit our November goal.**

[**Our records show that you haven't donated yet. Please make your first contribution today to help build the strongest grassroots movement possible.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528991/45c30650/105688dcc/66f40eb0/117714156/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU4Rl9FR1JfTU1VX1FfMjAxOTExMTRfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML58F_EGR_MMU_Q_20191114_V1S3_P_T1")

For our campaign and our movement, the next few... | | | "" We're less than three months away from when caucusing and voting starts, and while that may seem like a long time, it's actually no time at all. For our campaign and our movement, the next few weeks are going to be absolutely critical. Here's why: What happens in these next few weeks will help set the game plan for our campaign in 2020. If we drop the ball now, there may not be time to pick it up again. There aren't always redos, second tries, or next times. Simply put, it's going to take an incredible amount of resources to get this done. And, in order to raise what it'll take to win in the first caucuses and primaries, we need to hit our fundraising goals this month. It's the middle of the month and we're short of where we need to be to hit our November goal. Friend,

Since announcing my re-election campaign for Sheriff of Maricopa County, things have yet to go as expected.

And with less than 48 hours until my critical November mid-month fundraising deadline, **[I need 350 grassroots conservatives to support my campaign before midnight](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b574871b97ed4730bac56c9fcfad457d&_e=19aaCklOLF_-O9ngKOd3aG6M2WfU-4jamG0uLUo5U38O6_KhtGbcl3JNic7s6_X-XP8jO_ABzKV7UUyNDxdjPdnmRguWuBBAve8BO_AgESDLwFkUZdH5J4AYat1ZIdiG-JfEIWmNIdDpuCGKy0ow7eJVlqqwt0orDDHEKDi7kvuxJNnBcYHsjnV1VtPLhH8s_idWd2a6R9QprWVtkQ6kygInkBxZNfQCaZfoLk8KmIkOD9muVo5bDh6aW_x9Ft8_r2Oe-JY4Q5JNkwVl3mWKkYA5KAn-1IFsFB_2kUU3M2g7OxHagXdVJp_x_bq0o7wbDcjmI7O3T6pm6cr5Hm6dU_yYQXR3bAhkdso6uphkubvNy6CUzdzsJRP4fZG8_vwp)** – or I will be forced to drop out.
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE

Democrats think me campaigning on my old school, tough as nails approach to keeping America safe **_is helpless_** against their progressive agenda.

Man are they wrong.

Our country is desperate for proven leaders, like myself, to step up and take the challenges we’re facing head on.

But in order for me to win this race, build the Wall, and END the immigration crisis riddling our country – **[I need to hear from you before my midnight deadline.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b574871b97ed4730bac56c9fcfad457d&_e=19aaCklOLF_-O9ngKOd3aG6M2WfU-4jamG0uLUo5U38O6_KhtGbcl3JNic7s6_X-XP8jO_ABzKV7UUyNDxdjPdnmRguWuBBAve8BO_AgESDLwFkUZdH5J4AYat1ZIdiG-JfEIWmNIdDpuCGKy0ow7eJVlqqwt0orDDHEKDi7kvvJJuOCFiY2Ta4ksPVV3kipwVRf7dwQJuEitH_Zhn8tITn742KKA7JwUfXlBao5T7sXGMkiDhF9SyRyGF347T0xKvEadce2t9I0IXDNFuAk7IF6TR5okw5W2RnPoJa5eovCBE5_rBdfHOi60kj3qNVpOqHsARHZFKNIxaw-32gyLfIsJN53ZHIS5SqboTZhfr6saAsSZ-nKr7U6124beoti)**

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

Friend,
For far too long, the liberal elites of this country have been trying to silence the conservative voice of this country. The silent majority deserves to have their voice heard!
In order to better represent you, my team has prepared a survey that will allow us to get a full picture of what issues Texans truly care about. Share your thoughts on what are the greatest issues facing our country and what we can do to fix them.
[**Friend, I need to know what you value, so I can best represent you in the Senate. Will you take my priorities survey now?**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=3daec1cf26394bbb965402f479bffd1f&_e=Z-13IREFdckipu9TloYP43piCGPl-SXD0LHo5I8-sxsA86HkVaBSbKMjn7C7wccFMetybKjnqjTqYt96GWgY72jsB_5CgmLGOK85_U9-K7L0vR4UZ5XADWbqVMt2ZVb5KERp-V2jEsFYswIJz4hHjyLwIa7JbEpnJiZOWstDBcCzP854LPuqUtE-X_VVuTdXiqeoxq3zcKFTyJhM_0eOY3IVAbPq6i8rOnBKwDbnUolHM0i25nFWdUVmjZ27TloM1W6hB0Q-_qfXu3goifsTEakKysTxx0laaDsIYLG-TZIX_H3h5IWB5eTnwfzuGtPzBXwmJeNYwOfbfGQLPTfreq9N02mR_cU938CMAIjs3oxhu0-BsJQyYKTXoRTwvWS_9obOnws1nSXFQ-qoLOTKKrXiAWxde0UyMA3BuY8lQg2SlvdeUMeRmRJnhx-4Dl0I)

I have always pledged to fight for Texans every step of the way. The hard-working men and women of Texas give hope to all of America. Let me continue sharing your voice and values for all of America to hear, so let me know which issues you care about the most.
[**In order to best represent all Texans, I need to know where you stand. Team,
Thanks to your help, our campaign just reached 100,000 online contributions! That is an incredible accomplishment that demonstrates the grassroots strength of this campaign in a BIG way.
But I'm going to be very honest with you right now:
Tomorrow marks the halfway point for this quarter, but we are still not halfway to our fundraising goal.
We outraised Susan Collins last quarter, and all eyes are on us to see if we can do it again.

Amy Mesner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Early Bird: Congress of Counties Registration Now Open!
body:
We'll be kicking off the new year with another Congress of Counties! Registration is now open for this two-day Republican training event! Congress... |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=43846f6149&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican -

Early Bird registration for Congress of Counties 2020 is [now open](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b1d8318f25&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

**This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for January 31 – February 1 in downtown Indianapolis.**
[\--> Register Now at the Early Bird Rate! <\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d51ca06cff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2020’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics like:
* Candidate recruitment
* Fundraising
* Communications and social media
* Technology
* And so much more to be announced soon!

The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2020 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track.

**And if you[book your registration now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b12b91c96&e=1acd9bb3d6), you’ll save (_like a good fiscal conservative_)! We now have an [Early Bird Rate of $75/person available](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=584129010d&e=1acd9bb3d6). General admission registration (with access to all of the same programming) will then be available for $100/person starting on December 1.**

We hope to see you next year at Congress of Counties!

Thanks!
-Your Indiana Republican Party Team
---
|
---

body:

| | I'll tell you why every top Democrat is emailing you: \-- Nancy Pelosi \-- Ben Ray Lujan \-- Kirsten Gillibrand \-- James Carville \-- Khizr Khan \-- Ted Lieu \-- Deb Haaland \-- Pramila Jayapal \-- Jacky Rosen \-- Gabby Giffords That's because this is one of the biggest deadlines Ben Ray has ever faced in his Senate race. If we fall short, we could squander our once-in-a-lifetime shot to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate! [**_Can I count on you to help Ben Ray out with $5 before his massive mid-month deadline in 24 hours? He needs 1,794 Democrats to step up before the deadline. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191114_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Everybody under the sun has been asking me: Can we really defeat Mitch McConnell for the first time in 30 years? I'll tell you what I always say: I KNOW this is our best shot in decades to oust McConnell -- AND defeat his entire Republican Senate. **But our chances take a huge hit if we lose Ben Ray's critical Senate race in New Mexico.** Can I count on your $5 before Ben Ray's critical mid-month deadline in 24 hours? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191114_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b433/18e32a7f/53d58f14/7b22fcae/1600576201/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: Booker HQ
subject: Unlimited.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, **In July:** When Tom Steyer entered this race -- months after Cory and the majority of the field -- he pledged to spend _up to $100 million_ to fund his own campaign. **Since then:** He's spent _over $35 million_ of his personal fortune on television and online ads in an attempt to purchase on-the-ground support and qualify for debate stages. **Most recently:** Steyer said he is now willing to spend an _" unlimited"_ amount of money on his candidacy to continue to sway the outcome of this race. Our campaign is powered by people like you. Not corporate PACs. Not federal lobbyists. Not fossil fuel or pharma execs. And certainly not self-funded by our candidate's personal fortune. That's why our campaign set up a Ground Game Fund to secure our spot on the December debate stage -- the right way. **Campaigns should be powered by the people, not the candidate. name: Ed Markey
subject: Denier-in-Chief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

For too long, the agenda in the Senate under Republicans has been controlled by Big Oil and corporate polluters.

With Mitch McConnell and President Trump -- the Denier-in-Chief -- kowtowing to Big Oil, they're rejecting any progress to combat the climate crisis.

**But the message voters sent in this month 's elections is clear: Get out of the way of progress, or you're going to lose your seats.**

With the Green New Deal, we're leading a political revolution to take back the agenda-setting power in our country and return it to the American people.

That's why I'm fighting every day to pass a Green New Deal and set our country on a course to combat the climate crisis.

_**[But I need your help in this fight. Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us raise $25,000 before the end of the week?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-111419_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

We need to show that grassroots Democrats are standing up and ready to fight for a Green New Deal, and that those who stand in the way will find themselves out of power. Please, pitch in what you can now.

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $10 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-111419_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Mitch McConnell's money machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are mobilizing every resource at their disposal to hang on to this Senate seat--and it's because we came out swinging. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144b/691c9bd/6f8d5efe/11a7f5e8/1045798031/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | We need to raise $100,000 by Saturday to counter Cory Gardner's latest Trump-assisted fundraising haul. **Can you chip in now?**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Team,

From day one of this race, I've been honest about what we're up against: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are mobilizing every resource at their disposal to hang on to this Senate seat.

They're scared, and it's because we came out swinging. In just two months, we've built a grassroots operation that has proven to be highly competitive with the fundraising machine Mitch McConnell's been building for _decades_.

**Our campaign represents a major threat to McConnell 's grip on power, and he isn't going to let go without a fight.**

But here's the honest truth: Cory Gardner has had a big month.

Trump headlined high-dollar fundraisers for Gardner, and he mobilized the Trump campaign's online base to chip in $100,000 to Gardner's campaign.

We've been here before, and we've proven that we can close the fundraising gap fast. But with McConnell and Trump taking an increased interest in this race, we can't afford to fall farther behind.

**We 're setting a goal to raise $100,000 by Saturday night to help counter Trump's fundraising assist. Can you make a donation right now?**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._
[**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo__expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
Thank you,
John
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191114_JH_20191114-fr-JH-moneymachine-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. name: Monika
subject: 99 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
We've been on this journey for 99 days, and I'm so grateful for your support.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d97c/7dfbb003/42ac773a/5527b64f/3730361154/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191114_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191114_em_experience&source=rtw_20191114_em_experience")
---
Friend,

In the last 99 days, I've heard countless stories of people around this district--people who are tired of a representative who doesn't answer their questions, vote in their favor, or fight on their behalf.

**Each one reminds me why this campaign to serve with integrity is so important. When the days get long, those stories are what I think of.**

We've got a few months to go until the primary--and until then, I plan on working hard, every day, to show you, and the rest of North Carolina's 2nd District, just how seriously I take the job of serving in Congress.

Thank you for believing in my vision for a representative who will listen, work hard, and legislate with integrity, doing what's best for our district. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for supporting my campaign.

Now today, I'm going to ask you again to support us. This campaign is working against an incumbent with right-wing support and the money to go far.

I think we deserve a fighting chance, too--and that starts with you. [**Will you pitch in $25, or whatever you can, to my campaign today?**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d97c/7dfbb003/42ac773a/5527b64c/3730361154/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191114_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+pitch+in+25+or+whatever+you+can&utm_campaign=rtw_20191114_em_experience&source=rtw_20191114_em_experience") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d97c/7dfbb003/42ac773a/5527b64d/3730361154/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191114_em_experience&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+5+raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191114_em_experience&source=rtw_20191114_em_experience")

clean_body: We've been on this journey for 99 days, and I'm so grateful for your support. | "" Friend, In the last 99 days, I've heard countless stories of people around this district--people who are tired of a representative who doesn't answer their questions, vote in their favor, or fight on their behalf. Each one reminds me why this campaign to serve with integrity is so important. When the days get long, those stories are what I think of. We've got a few months to go until the primary--and until then, I plan on working hard, every day, to show you, and the rest of North Carolina's 2nd District, just how seriously I take the job of serving in Congress. Thank you for believing in my vision for a representative who will listen, work hard, and legislate with integrity, doing what's best for our district. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for supporting my campaign. Now today, I'm going to ask you again to support us. This campaign is working against an incumbent with right-wing support and the money to go far. I think we deserve a fighting chance, too--and that starts with you. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Thank you for all that you do, Monika | | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. "" PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS Monika for Congress PO BOX 99092 Raleigh, NC 27624 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Update from the campaign trail
body:
We're working hard to earn your vote.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/got-a-minute-1523857?e=90fad69796)
https://secure.anedot.com/bobby-for-iowa/cf28bc2d98fa80dc53926
https://secure.anedot.com/bobby-for-iowa/cf28bc2d98fa80dc53926
Hey Peter,

We are now several months into our campaign to take back IA-02 for conservatives and aren't slowing down.

We've been to several events in the last few weeks in our efforts to hear the concerns of real Iowans that I want to highlight for you.
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158253925943488?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARA3XQEVDC_MoUUg3E3qFa8K2LFouj5I2zTIvLoLMM4CkR9AQE0Oei4P7_BJDfZr1C8qVmg2EPbgzIn6_8-6qgGmf21DEp4BIFjTmBraX2AVsfPyZgsmqkp2ANB1sMFj6q4o5QsO8dNThvRWn3MrAApPSuLv3zpcEyl_RfKw0jqe_5hsTzSH8pYfdVpp1SfWa-RTj0lKelqrd2e-ZW-0OpeXTVc4325pcAvmYT-s1JDFBPRdTiAopr-0ZnA0FwduOieAozb-WgMDetrJ-xxFbPDeD0gwGh_hRjYCWet3zuerbqRnyBt_ZXhmOCAfMgn8mR1p4f8pdEQsPSkDUQ&__tn__=-R
On Veterans Day, I attended the Bettendorf Veterans Day Ceremony with Bettendorf Mayor Robert S. Gallagher and Keynote Speaker and Army Veteran Jeno Berta. In Congress, I’ll fight to ensure Iowa’s military veterans receive the best treatment possible from our VA system.
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/photos/a.10152405328973488/10158173076153488/?type=3&theater
Recently I was honored to meet Christians United for Israel director and US Commission on Religious Freedom appointee Gary Bauer. I’ve always been an ardent supporter of Israel and I’ll continue that support in Congress. The socialist squad's hatred for one of our greatest allies is part of why it's so necessary we take back the House in 2020.
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158198007413488?__xts__[0]=68.ARClNh-qH4cLlMKPT9cxQf52-RtEvgG2B-wkq0QN0ug5AOsqRUUaD_zmb_de45v7ePdzg29yYDU1x7aek4WL_EpKSRkc4G7SQyaKRs8twc_LcjITMYCrIEdlCr5bMcN7urnNSUzyH3j40cxVWqzUoXvBa_u9P3tWujZkkslIvkvyuI39WqEbQaxjxvy8pNAi5gWmhWzXFluyxEGHmdoQJPD6UqT24-reh-4j3lCius6nOqfjYFYhsz6OKzN_X8qgLjEOhtL65KkcqhwuM62bdSqKkjsaBQ2qU3rOXQNqvYBRKqtsWZUKHmAtEHVItzybi7j2CXbimnL-xABNVg&__tn__=-R
I was grateful to attend the Pregnancy Center's annual fundraiser recently in Clinton, Iowa. It was great visiting with the keynote speaker Bob Vander Plaats, such a great group of pro-lifers fighting for unborn children. Thank you to all the folks dedicated to protecting and helping the most defenseless and vulnerable at the Pregnancy Center.
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158212959513488?__xts__[0]=68.ARCQh8_TRWR3qdOZyvZIYA23SnX2mpA_eVato0coA6g4VGaO2tM9tZxN7Uj_BGUurUV9OSqQAod1gYxWwpwxAuEtGLyiFZV4zdZM01rBtV97HjQB4L-vtNkJd11IRwSKqViuHKbAD8KXlvyghaLWmmg4ocfqrYP9Xr5JjEZUqtwxplBxS2fgA4JSgkhNLzPSN3164AZ60R_hhgm4VLz7xoQzbtat3T9HfJaE3ukd2JC3SFwJudZKz-Z7mV7MqS8fjtGHBi5GcaPH30p_pVz_C5-w23uGZEZWBWX-pntq6V2Ep_d15BQ9zaIf6deVh0_P8VNtZT4sUT4OJIb1yw&__tn__=-R
I love seeing young people engaged in their community, and that's why it was such a joy to meet with the University of Iowa College Republicans. It’s always great to meet with young conservatives fighting the good fight on campus. Thank you everyone! #LetsGoHawks
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158243941683488?__xts__[0]=68.ARDSC9QRILc2zgssszl5IxWu10kqERokWsTGFKlFYzcv2PkltuWddZxADjO4k5yl1M__ZNYghRroTkqNf271RrdsEpqWYhBJCvvV1aQKSbQg6-YkFXs7sAgHDXDiErAY4I4FxeDjUyXrLLpq_TtlivzuKN2h6C3zKfQEJL2QEsfAsJsboexdz9WsTg5N9r5lVrQxa1_lCIf35FjFg5gHRwnRN2DodHmpmI-onTo5FD-5eiMIqeAqbowlxALXCDV2qREzrpmdUgJ6K6nlRPffVbnezyYbZGfkb8NcjmGOdIg9DFct4oZA95mUoHtjFZ_P_9NaNSCouSeYE-Quuw&__tn__=-R
I had an awesome time at the Republican Party of Iowa’s Lincoln Reagan Dinner. It was great seeing so many local patriots and even Senator Lindsey Graham made an appearance!
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158192244153488?__xts__[0]=68.ARAB53WtYfpt-5THzn3u1oMREW8c7szXH6tI63QRhkbkpx2q2KAVwmdGxg--2Qg8JHCdVvaTD4dVQTVJyGEd9_2W_n8shnYPcRo4vpOBR7FbMqInmR6vUqkQvpyomD0a8VbxSXUjoAK9eBYxrfuZ254NM6AfLSJ5YSzlKixLfjHKr22HbWIt1x5wQsBVbFbZWpt6tnsZDgIel_ITEFVwLNdJEorlqzhepXfJtK4sVTdd5I-h-cOdhMM4pm_7KdjTUemmt1byhXxlOZEPkErOPwMK_y-N8Ff1fIKf6dTdfTH0AGJcBaF9SevRbwxhI41vkiSm3tzU2PbfJ9f8hQ&__tn__=-R
In late October, I also spoke to the Keokuk County Republicans. It was a great time talking conservative politics with this awesome group of Iowans.
https://www.facebook.com/BobbySchillingIA/posts/10158249430968488?__tn__=-R
Of course, not everyone goes to political events so we've been sure to take our message straight to voters and do plenty of block-walking. We’re crisscrossing the district, engaging folks and doing what we need to do to win in 2020.
We're working hard to earn your vote and take back IA-02 for conservatives. If you think making sure President Trump has a conservative House when he wins re-election in 2020 is a top priority, please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 and help us fight the liberal money flowing into Iowa. (https://secure.anedot.com/bobby-for-iowa/cf28bc2d98fa80dc53926)

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. And we can't do that unless we match the liberals dollar-for-dollar in what is going to be a very expensive race. Please contribute even $5 or anything you can today. (https://secure.anedot.com/bobby-for-iowa/cf28bc2d98fa80dc53926)

Thanks so much and God bless.

--Bobby Schilling
Donate Now › (https://secure.anedot.com/bobby-for-iowa/cf28bc2d98fa80dc53926)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: RE: Americans with disabilities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
SIGN ON BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Support Julian's plan to PROTECT and EXPAND the rights of people with disabilities. >> | | |
---
| |
---
| | **BREAKING: Juli an Castro unveils sweeping disability plan** **[_SIGN ON BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Support Juli an's plan to PROTECT and EXPAND the rights of people with disabilities. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acd/2359737371/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/disabilities-rights-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b2_castro_all")** I need you to read this right away: When the Americans with Disabilities Act was deadlocked in Congress, **people with disabilities got down on their hands and knees and crawled up the 83 steps of the Capitol building.** Despite its passage -- and decades of progress -- people with disabilities: \-- Are twice as likely to live in poverty and to be unemployed \-- Are more likely to be victims of violent crime, sexual assault, police brutality, and end up in prison \-- Can legally be paid pennies on the dollar I'll be direct: **People with disabilities are strong and resilient, but too often have been excluded from the rest of society and ignored by our politics.** [**_I 'm asking you to sign your name next to mine before midnight: Sign on to support my ambitious disability plan -- and demand every candidate for President release a plan to expand the rights of people with disabilities. >>_** ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acd/2359737371/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/disabilities-rights-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b2_castro_all") As I've listened to people with disabilities, it's clear that these challenges have been ignored by politicians in Washington. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acd/2359737371/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/disabilities-rights-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b2_castro_all")
---

**We need a new generation of leadership with bold solutions to lift up people that have been left out.**

My new disability policy focused on four goals of the ADA:

\-- Equal opportunity
\-- Full community inclusion
\-- Dignity for people with disabilities
\-- Economic empowerment

As president, I'll fight to empower and improve the lives of individuals with disabilities -- in housing, jobs, education, accessibility, and elsewhere.

[_**If you agree that we must PROTECT and EXPAND rights for people with disabilities, add your name next to mine before midnight. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acd/2359737371/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/disabilities-rights-survey?source=20191114_em_pet_b2_castro_all")

Thanks,

Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acc/2359737371/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9acb/2359737371/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9aca/2359737371/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9ac9/2359737371/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d9ac8/2359737371/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc829/3eb3e2fc/56be40f4/744d6537/2359737371/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mark Kelly pursues justice while McSally buries her head in the sand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Democrat Mark Kelly has said from the beginning of the inquiry that the details surrounding Trump's dealings with Ukraine must be investigated. Meanwhile, GOP Senator Martha McSally joined Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the corrupt Senate Republicans in condemning the House's impeachment investigation, refusing to hold the president accountable for his corrupt, backwards political dealings. She has chosen to continue down the hyper-partisan, Trump-supporting path that she has consistently campaigned that she is not on. She isn't working for her constituents or trying to bridge gaps with her colleagues \-- she's busy trying to shield Trump. Arizona voters are noticing \-- Democrat Mark Kelly has been making serious headway in flipping this critical Senate seat blue \-- and he's up 47 to 45 against McSally. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have all placed the Arizona race firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws **_multiple times!_** We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc31/6e9863e8/16401f2a/1db097fb/154456763/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/DvBU8UY7") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc31/6e9863e8/16401f2a/1db097fb/154456763/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/DvBU8UY7") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc31/6e9863e8/16401f2a/1db097f9/154456763/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=OUT20191114c.ND-b&refcode2=6smGnngie1MI0vnSIDe3")

clean_body: | | | Peter, Democrat Mark Kelly has said from the beginning of the inquiry that the details surrounding Trump's dealings with Ukraine must be investigated. Meanwhile, GOP Senator Martha McSally joined Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the corrupt Senate Republicans in condemning the House's impeachment investigation, refusing to hold the president accountable for his corrupt, backwards political dealings. She has chosen to continue down the hyper-partisan, Trump-supporting path that she has consistently campaigned that she is not on. She isn't working for her constituents or trying to bridge gaps with her colleagues \-- she's busy trying to shield Trump. Arizona voters are noticing \-- Democrat Mark Kelly has been making serious headway in flipping this critical Senate seat blue \-- and he's up 47 to 45 against McSally. The Cook Political Report , Inside Elections , and Sabato 's Crystal Ball have all placed the Arizona race firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws multiple times! We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: Who do you support for U.S. Senate? "" "" Thanks for your support, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign my petition: Fire Betsy DeVos.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb8d/6cd27893/521beae2/15879240/1683269665/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | **I've said it before, and I'll keep saying it as long as Donald Trump retains Betsy DeVos as Secretary of Education: she is unfit for the job.** Betsy DeVos is not an advocate for public education. She never was. She never will be. [**Please sign my petition: it's time to fire Betsy DeVos**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb8d/6cd27893/521beae2/15879241/1683269665/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019/?code=merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2019-11-secretaryofeducation2019-email%26recurring%3D1%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26amounts%3D%7B%7Babamt_one%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_two%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_three%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_four%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_five%7D%7D")**.** Public school teachers, parents, and education advocates have all had enough of DeVos: **they care about providing the best for America's students.** DeVos ignores the consequences of gun violence in our schools. She's rolling back protections for survivors of sexual assault. She's trying to choke off our public education system by diverting dollars to private schools. DeVos repeatedly blocked rules designed to protect students attending for-profit colleges. And most recently? She was held in contempt of court and fined $100,000 for ignoring a federal court's order to stop enforcing loans made to defrauded students at those very same for-profit colleges. It's time to stand up and fight back against this disastrous agenda. We need a Secretary of Education who's committed to protecting our students and fighting for their education. [**Sign the petition: urge the Trump administration to fire Betsy DeVos**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb8d/6cd27893/521beae2/15879241/1683269665/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA name: Gary Peters
subject: why this is so troubling:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
\- -
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa4e/5721a3ed/71156c7c/efa88c1/3329699410/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

For Michiganders, the Great Lakes are part of our DNA. Our clean drinking water, our ecosystem and our jobs depend on protecting the lakes.
That's why this is so troubling: The president has tried not once, not twice, but t _hree times_ to cut or eliminate funding used to preserve our Great Lakes. But in the Senate, I've fought time after time to protect funding for our Great Lakes, including a $9 million funding _increase_ just this year.
And as you may know, I'm up for reelection next year. My opponent has said he supports Trump's agenda "2,000%," and it looks like he's a man of his word, _even at the expense of Michiganders._ **Meanwhile, recent polls show I 'm tied with my hard-right opponent, and the GOP is helping to funnel millions into Michigan to defeat me. **
Mitch McConnell and my Trump-backed opponent may support the president auctioning off our natural resources to the highest corporate bidder, but I sure as heck do not. **With all eyes on our Senate race in Michigan, I need grassroots Democrats like you to join me. I 'm hoping for another 812 responses by midnight, and it looks like I'm missing yours. Tell me:**
**Do you trust Donald Trump to protect our environment? **
| | | [Yes](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-TrumpSurvey-Great-Lakes?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk130-su-nd")
---
| [No](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-TrumpSurvey-Great-Lakes?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk130-su-nd")
---
Thanks for speaking out.

Gary
