clean_body: \- - | | | "" Friends, For Michiganders, the Great Lakes are part of our DNA. Our clean drinking water, our ecosystem and our jobs depend on protecting the lakes. That's why this is so troubling: The president has tried not once, not twice, but t hree times to cut or eliminate funding used to preserve our Great Lakes. But in the Senate, I've fought time after time to protect funding for our Great Lakes, including a $9 million funding increase just this year. And as you may know, I'm up for reelection next year. My opponent has said he supports Trump's agenda "2,000%," and it looks like he's a man of his word, even at the expense of Michiganders. Meanwhile, recent polls show I 'm tied with my hard-right opponent, and the GOP is helping to funnel millions into Michigan to defeat me. Mitch McConnell and my Trump-backed opponent may support the president auctioning off our natural resources to the highest corporate bidder, but I sure as heck do not. With all eyes on our Senate race in Michigan, I need grassroots Democrats like you to join me. I 'm hoping for another 812 responses by midnight, and it looks like I'm missing yours. Tell me: Do you trust Donald Trump to protect our environment? | | | "" | "" Thanks for speaking out. Gary | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. name: Trump Watch 2020
subject: “... dictators, it’s okay.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu2VP0MJVzGP6JSd1fUsMx_o&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=1) Team — we’ve always known Donald Trump likes dictators, **_but now he’s openly inviting them to the White House_**. [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu2VP0MJVzGP6JSd1fUsMx_o&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=2) The United States of America is supposed to be a shining example of democracy and freedom, **_but what does it say about our country that the president just invited every oppressive regime on the planet to join him for a photo-op at the White House?_** It is absurdly irresponsible for President Trump to _even hint_ that dictators can visit him at the White House,**and even after years in office, the president is**** _still_****too cozy with authoritarian rulers.** This public invitation to the world’s dictators only makes our movement that much more important. President Trump is never going to grow into his role as President of the United States,**so we’re going to have to do whatever we can to kick him out of the White House.** [**Can you rush a donation of $20.20 today to help us unseat Donald Trump before he embarrasses and undermines this country any further?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu2VP0MJVzGP6JSd1fUsMx_o&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=3) | | [DONATE NOW ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu2VP0MJVzGP6JSd1fUsMx_o&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=4)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=6) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191114fr_s&n=8), software for leaders.
